response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Checked the provided context. No vocal music is present in the segment.
2. JSON Usage: Used the descriptions of the scenes to guide the transcription.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both spoken dialogue and on-screen text precisely, ensuring perfect synchronization with the video. On-screen text during silent periods is included as per the Visual Events exception.

subtitles.original: My apologies, I was busy eating.
subtitles.english: My apologies, I was busy eating.

subtitles.original: Did the mic taste good? Oh wait, I forgot.
subtitles.english: Did the mic taste good? Oh wait, I forgot.

subtitles.original: Ah, sorry guys, I pulled up my backup microphone.
subtitles.english: Ah, sorry guys, I pulled up my backup microphone.

subtitles.original: Phew, good thing I have backups, you know?
subtitles.english: Phew, good thing I have backups, you know?

subtitles.original: Sometimes you just want to eat... you just want to eat some mics, you know?
subtitles.english: Sometimes you just want to eat... you just want to eat some mics, you know?

subtitles.original: And you have to make sure you eat them muted because they're going to scream if you don't.
subtitles.english: And you have to make sure you eat them muted because they're going to scream if you don't.

subtitles.original: You don't want your neighbors hearing that.
subtitles.english: You don't want your neighbors hearing that.

subtitles.original: You don't want them to call the police.
subtitles.english: You don't want them to call the police.

subtitles.original: Oh, I just had a great idea.
subtitles.english: Oh, I just had a great idea.
